final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural / scientific-visualization
Asset type: astronomical science visualization, wide-field deep-space composite image
Primary request: majestic view of the Milky Way galactic center region rendered in the style of Hubble Space Telescope and James Webb Space Telescope imagery
Scene/backdrop: deep space, pitch-black void studded with countless stars and colorful nebulae; two distant galaxies undergoing collision and merger with dramatic tidal tails visible at the periphery
Subject: supermassive black hole at image center surrounded by a blazing accretion disk emitting intense orange-red and white radiation; gravitational lensing effect bending background starlight into a perfect Einstein ring; hundreds of millions of surrounding stars ranging from blue-white young hot stars to orange-red aged giant stars forming a luminous stellar sea; several towering nebula gas pillars extending from frame edges in red, orange, and violet emission-nebula hues
Style/medium: photorealistic astronomical photography composite, scientific visualization, Hubble + JWST telescope imaging aesthetic — false-color emission mapping, fine star diffraction spikes, deep-field long-exposure rendering
Composition/framing: wide-field centered composition, black hole and accretion disk as focal anchor, radial star density increasing toward center, nebula pillars framing edges, merging galaxies in far background
Lighting/mood: self-luminous deep-space scene; accretion disk casts hard white-orange glow; nebulae glow with diffuse emission light; overall mood is awe-inspiring, scientifically grand, visually overwhelming
Color palette: deep space black base; accretion disk in brilliant white-orange-red gradient; Einstein ring in warm gold; stellar sea in blue-white and orange-red; nebula pillars in crimson, burnt orange, violet-purple; tidal tails in soft blue-white
Materials/textures: glowing ionized gas with wispy filament detail, dense star field with point-source diffraction spikes, smooth accretion disk with turbulent plasma swirls, translucent nebula veils layered over star clusters
Constraints: scientifically accurate depiction of gravitational lensing (Einstein ring), accretion disk geometry, and emission nebula color mapping; black hole silhouette must be clearly defined against the glowing disk
Avoid: cartoon or fantasy aesthetic, incorrect black hole geometry, oversaturated neon colors inconsistent with real telescope imagery, watermark
